title: ActiveCampaign vs Omnisend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign vs Omnisend. See pricing, features, and which platform suits your business best.
intro: ActiveCampaign and Omnisend are both powerful email marketing platforms with SMS capabilities, but they serve different primary audiences. ActiveCampaign is a comprehensive business automation suite ideal for enterprises needing advanced CRM and lead scoring, while Omnisend specializes in ecommerce with omnichannel features and push notifications. Understanding their key differences will help you choose the right tool for your specific business needs.

comparison_table.tool_a: Lead scoring, site tracking, dynamic content, SMS
comparison_table.tool_b: Push notifications, product picker, pre-built workflows, SMS

choose_a_if: You need advanced lead scoring and comprehensive CRM functionality for B2B or complex sales processes
You require sophisticated automation workflows and site tracking capabilities
You want an all-in-one business platform that extends beyond email marketing
choose_b_if: You run an ecommerce store and want email, SMS, and push notifications in one platform
You're budget-conscious and want to start with a free tier before upgrading
You need pre-built workflows and a product picker specifically designed for online sellers

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign excels in enterprise automation and CRM, earning higher G2 ratings for feature depth, while Omnisend scores better on Trustpilot (4.6 vs 4.1) and specializes in ecommerce. For B2B and complex workflows, ActiveCampaign wins; for ecommerce and ease of use, Omnisend is superior.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Omnisend?
faq.a: Omnisend is cheaper for small businesses since it offers a free tier supporting up to 250 subscribers, while ActiveCampaign starts at $15/month with no free option. However, at higher subscriber counts, pricing varies based on your specific plan and features needed.

faq.q: Can I switch from Omnisend to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support data export and integration capabilities. Most email marketing tools allow you to export your subscriber lists and campaign history, though you may need to manually recreate automation workflows in ActiveCampaign due to differences in their automation architecture.
